name: neutrino-architecture-contract
purpose: Define architecture in one place and enforce implementation conformance.
principles: All infrastructure integrations must be implemented as adapters behind stable ports.
Application code imports contract ports, not concrete infrastructure adapters.
Postgres is the durable system of record; vector and realtime systems can be swapped.
Deployment must remain push-to-deploy through CI workflows and IaC-managed environments.
Terraform-managed infrastructure must use a shared remote state backend instead of machine-local state.
The frontend design system is mandatory and built on shared shadcn/ui-based primitives and tokens.

deployment.apiContainer: Portable to App Runner through a standard Docker runtime contract.

designSystem.rule: Frontend features consume shared tokens and primitives instead of ad hoc page-level systems.

ports.swapRule: App and domain layers depend on AIProvider only.
VectorStore is selected by configuration, not by app imports.
Realtime protocol details stay inside collab adapters.
Provider APIs are abstracted by RepoProvider.
